_export.subject: Able.cz s.r.o.
_export.note: Derived and verified from preserved, hashed artifacts; nothing added.

claim.text: During the execution window, Melichárek's shareholding records show re-registrations across four companies: Able.cz s.r.o. (20 Jan 2026, cleared by 2 Apr 2026), M&M plan s.r.o. (21 Jan 2026), FaMe logistics s.r.o. (23 Jan 2026) and FaMe trade s.r.o. (26 Jan 2026) — the register-visible footprint of enforcement against his podíly.
claim.note: The dated re-registrations are observed in the preserved VR records; the SL69 order names the Able.cz podíl explicitly. Attributing the other three companies' churn to the same case 219 EX 00241/26 is highly consistent in timing but not stated in those records themselves.
